zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarete von Hengebach於1216年出生在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀史洛斯波可拉海姆時，她的父親Eberhard III von Hengebach24歲，母親Elisabeth VON AHR-HOCHSTADEN21歲。她於1240年與Simon I. von Sponheim在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀史洛斯波可拉海姆結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1291年在德國海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀可茲納賀享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margarete von Hengebach于1216年出生在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀史洛斯波可拉海姆时，她的父亲Eberhard III von Hengebach24岁，母亲Elisabeth VON AHR-HOCHSTADEN21岁。她于1240年与Simon I. von Sponheim在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀史洛斯波可拉海姆结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1291年在德国海藍-普法爾茲巴德 可茲納賀可茲納賀享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Hengebach
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of Hengsbach, a habitational name from a farm near Siegen, North Rhine-Westphalia.

nameMeanings.name: Margarete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarete von Hengebach was born in 1216, in Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, her father, Eberhard III von Hengebach, was 24 and her mother, Elisabeth VON AHR-HOCHSTADEN, was 21. She married Simon I. von Sponheim in 1240, in Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1291, in Kreuznach, Bad Kreuznach, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarete von Hengebach est née en 1216, à Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, son père, Eberhard III von Hengebach, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth VON AHR-HOCHSTADEN, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Simon I. von Sponheim en 1240, à Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1291, à Kreuznach, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarete von Hengebach 1216 in Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Eberhard III von Hengebach 24 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth VON AHR-HOCHSTADEN 21. Sie hat 1240 in Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland Simon I. von Sponheim geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1291 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Kreuznach, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland.

ko.lifeSummary: Margarete von Hengebach(이)가 1216년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 슐로ss브oc켈하임에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Eberhard III von Hengebach(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth VON AHR-HOCHSTADEN(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1240년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 슐로ss브oc켈하임에서 Simon I. von Sponheim(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1291년 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 바드 크레우즈나치 크레우즈나치에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margarete von Hengebach nasceu em 1216, em Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha, seu pai, Eberhard III von Hengebach, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth VON AHR-HOCHSTADEN, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon I. von Sponheim em 1240, em Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarete von Hengebach родилась в 1216 г. в местности щлоssбoккелхим, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия, её отцу по имени Eberhard III von Hengebach было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth VON AHR-HOCHSTADEN, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon I. von Sponheim в 1240 г. в местности щлоssбoккелхим, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1291 г. в местности креузнач, бад креузнач, раинланд-пфалз, Германия в возрасте 75 лет.

Se casó con Simon I. von Sponheim en 1240, en Schloßböckelheim, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1291, en Kreuznach, Bad Kreuznach, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania, a la edad de 75 años.
